title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and frames this as marking the beginning of a permanent underclass. The video title suggests the ban means Fable 5 will not return.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and argues the ban is permanent, meaning Fable 5 will not return. He frames the event as the start of a permanent underclass. The video's main claims are the ban itself and the broader social consequence Ondrej attaches to it.
